title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Mapei India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Mapei India
jsonLd.description:
We at Mapei India are looking for an experienced Plant Manager based out of Srinagar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Mapei India:
Mapei India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mapei India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
